Real-time Secure Access System

Supercharge Your After Effects Workflow

A premium suite of automation tools for professional video editors. Standard tools are 100% free out-of-the-box. Request registration only to unlock the premium DD Exclusive tab features.

Download Plugin (GitHub) Try the Live Plugin Panel

Try the Live Plugin Panel

Click, slide, and explore how the plugin panel looks and behaves directly inside your web browser below.

motionXpart CEP extension

Packed With Premium Tools

Automate tedious timelines and composition scaling processes inside Adobe After Effects.

🧹 Project Cleaner

Recursively scans your project files and instantly deletes unused files, composition layers, and empty folder trees to free memory.

🖥️ Comp Rescaler

Resize composition resolutions (9:16 vertical, 1:1 square, 16:9 landscape) while scaling all active layers and keyframes proportionally.

🎵 Beat-Sync Markers

Converts audio tracks into amplitude peak parameters and automatically generates composition timing markers based on configurable sound thresholds.

Request DD Exclusive Access

Note: Regular features of motionXpart are completely free and unlocked. Request access here only to activate the premium DD Exclusive tab features.
